name: Windsor Armless Patio Dining Stacking Chair Black - Threshold™
description:
Sit back and enjoy delicious meals with friends and family with this Windsor Armless Patio Dining Stacking Chair from Threshold™. Crafted from weather- and rust-resistant metal frame to withstand the outdoor elements, this armless dining chair features a seat and fan-like spindle back for a comfortable seating experience. Plus, the stackable design allows them to easily place together when not in use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
